app.name: Diary
app.tagline: Your personal space for thoughts, people and memories

descriptions.1: Major life events like getting married, a new job, moving abroad
descriptions.2: Important personal developments and meaningful experiences
descriptions.5: Casual thoughts and trivial daily anecdotes

diary.title: Diary
diary.noEntriesDescription: Start writing your thoughts for this day
diary.willBeSaidTo: Will be marked as said to
diary.deleteConfirmDescription: This will also delete its sub-entries. This cannot be undone.

people.title: People
people.name: Name
people.tagsDescription: Entries sharing these tags become talking points for this person
people.noPeopleDescription: Add the people you talk to and the diary will suggest what to tell them.
people.noTalkingPointsDescription: New entries that mention {{name}} or share their tags will appear here.
people.noMemoriesDescription: Important entries that mention {{name}} will resurface here after {{months}} months.
people.deleteConfirmDescription: Entries will be kept, but every mention, said-mark and hidden-mark of this person will be removed.
people.duplicate_name: A person with that name already exists
people.checkupRemindersDescription: Get an alert on this person's profile when it's been a while since you last talked.
people.checkupDueDescription: It's been a while since you last marked something as said to them.
people.phoneIncomplete: Not in international format — add the country code so WhatsApp and calls work.
people.wechatQrDescription: Scan this from your phone to open the chat in WeChat.
people.aliasesDescription: Nicknames this person also answers to. Used by @mentions and voice dictation.

tags.title: Tags
tags.name: Name
tags.noTagsDescription: Tags connect entries to people. Create a few to get started.
tags.deleteConfirmDescription: It will be removed from all entries and people that use it.
tags.duplicate_name: A tag with that name already exists

search.title: Search
search.noResultsDescription: Try different words or fewer filters.

decay.title: Talking point decay
decay.description: How long entries of each importance stay relevant as talking points. The value is a half-life in days: after that many days an entry has half its initial score, and it disappears once the score falls below the cutoff.

memories.title: Memories
memories.description: Entries that directly mention a person come back as shared memories once they are old enough.
memories.thresholdDescription: Only entries at this importance or higher become memories

broadcast.title: Broadcast to everyone
broadcast.description: Some entries can be suggested as talking points for every person, not just those they mention or share a tag with.
broadcast.lifeChangingDescription: Suggest every "Life-changing" entry to everyone, regardless of match.
broadcast.tagsDescription: Entries with these tags are suggested to everyone regardless of match.

checkups.title: Checkup reminders
checkups.description: Default checkup interval inherited by newly created people. Each person can override or disable it from their profile.

ai.title: AI assistant
ai.description: Record a voice note and let AI turn it into diary entry suggestions you can review before saving. Groq is required for transcription; adding an OpenRouter or Cerebras key switches the suggestion step to a stronger model instead of Groq's.
ai.apiKeyHint: Required for voice transcription. Free to get, used only to call Groq directly from this device. Get one at
ai.forceEnglishAIEvents: Force AI dictation suggestions to English
ai.forceEnglishAIEventsDescription: When enabled, entries created from voice dictation are written in English even if you speak another language.
ai.openRouterApiKeyHint: When set, used instead of Groq to turn transcripts into entry suggestions. Free to get, used only to call OpenRouter directly from this device. Get one at
ai.cerebrasApiKeyHint: When set, used instead of Groq to turn transcripts into entry suggestions. Free to get, used only to call Cerebras directly from this device. Get one at

person.duplicate_name: A person with that name already exists

tag.duplicate_name: A tag with that name already exists

ai.reviewDescription: Edit or remove anything before adding these to your diary.
ai.empty: Nothing to suggest from that recording
ai.invalid_key: Your LLM API key looks invalid
ai.rate_limited: LLM rate limit reached, try again shortly
ai.timeout: The LLM took too long to respond
ai.no_key: Add a Groq API key in settings first
ai.no_submission: Couldn't get a result from the assistant

import.title: Import from contacts
import.nativeOnly: Contacts can only be imported from the Android app.
import.noPermissionDescription: Grant the contacts permission in system settings to import people from your address book.
import.summaryNew: {{count}} contact will be added as a new person.
import.summaryNew_other: {{count}} contacts will be added as new people.
import.conflictDuplicate: “{{name}}” already exists. Two people can’t share a name.
import.conflictContainment: Looks similar to “{{name}}” — they might be the same person.
